author_cultural_context: Carolingian Latin Christian philosophy; Greek patristic translation and reception
author_bio: Joannes Scotus Eriugena was a ninth-century Irish scholar active in the Carolingian world, known for De divisione naturae/Periphyseon, De praedestinatione, and Latin translations or expositions of Greek Christian Neoplatonic material associated with Dionysius.
